question: The concept of 'performance analysis' in elite sport
options: Systematic collection and interpretation of data to improve performance
Both reduce perceived soreness; contrast bathing may better restore performance
Systematic heat exposure improves thermoregulation and endurance performance
Simulates altitude conditions at sea level to stimulate red blood cell production
answer: Systematic collection and interpretation of data to improve performance

question: 'GPS tracking technology' in team sports
options: Monitors player movement, distances covered, speeds and work rates
Tensiomyography and electromyography to assess muscle function
Sleep deprivation impairs reaction time, strength, endurance and cognitive function
A marker of recovery and autonomic nervous system function
answer: Monitors player movement, distances covered, speeds and work rates

question: The concept of 'force plate analysis'
options: Both reduce perceived soreness; contrast bathing may better restore performance
Measures ground reaction forces to assess jumping, landing and balance
Identifies the exercise intensity at which blood lactate begins to rise sharply
Systematic heat exposure improves thermoregulation and endurance performance
answer: Measures ground reaction forces to assess jumping, landing and balance
